resolution.instructions: Existing rows retain the live validated Como_hacerlo text under the primary source id. New rows use the family instruction below plus their row-specific start, range and equipment fields.
resolution.cues: Resolve cues_set first; append equipment-specific setup from the canonical row.
resolution.errors: Resolve error_set first; append movement override when present.
resolution.contraindications: contra_set is a screening key, never a diagnosis. safety_rules.csv decides action from symptom and severity.
resolution.media: Only verified owned/licensed assets can become verified. missing and existing_unverified never generate a URL.

instruction_families.squat: Brace before descent; track knees with feet; use the authorised pain-free depth; stand by extending hips and knees without losing foot pressure.
instruction_families.hinge: Set a neutral braced trunk; move hips back while the implement stays close; create leg and hip drive; finish tall without lumbar overextension.
instruction_families.lunge: Set stance and balance; descend through the authorised range with controlled knee tracking; drive through the whole front foot; regain control before the next rep.
instruction_families.horizontal_push: Brace the body; lower with controlled shoulder and elbow position; keep the authorised range; press without losing trunk alignment.
instruction_families.vertical_push: Brace ribs and pelvis; start from the specified rack; press through the authorised path; finish with controlled overhead alignment, not lumbar extension.
instruction_families.horizontal_pull: Set trunk and shoulder; initiate with scapular control; pull toward the prescribed contact point; lower without reaching or rotating.
instruction_families.vertical_pull: Begin from the authorised hang; set the shoulder; pull without uncontrolled swing unless a kipping permission exists; descend under control.
instruction_families.brace: Choose the prescribed lever; align ribs and pelvis; breathe behind the brace; end the set before position is lost.
instruction_families.carry: Lift with the authorised hinge or squat; stand balanced; walk with short controlled steps and stable trunk; place the load down with the same setup.
instruction_families.cyclical: Set the device or route; accelerate to target pace rather than sprinting the first interval; maintain repeatable mechanics; stop at the programmed score.
instruction_families.landing: Use the authorised height; land quietly on a stable whole foot with knee and hip flexion; show control before the next rep; step down when required.
instruction_families.olympic: Use the authorised start position and technical load; keep the implement close; extend then receive in the prescribed position; stand with control; terminate on repeated misses.
instruction_families.inversion: Verify wrist, shoulder and exit permissions; create a braced line; use the wall or spot specified; stop before loss of control.
instruction_families.sprawl: Brace before floor contact; use the authorised step or jump transition; keep shoulder and trunk control; stand or jump only after stable foot placement.
instruction_families.mobility: Move only through a symptom-free range at low tension; do not force end range; breathe normally; stop if symptoms increase.

HINGE: stand with glutes not lumbar extension
PACING: save acceleration for final authorised segment

KNEE_HIP: pain increasing with squat or step
UPPER_LIMB: pain increasing with grip or pull
CARDIO: dyspnoea at rest or mild effort
LUMBAR_SHOULDER: radiating symptoms or symptomatic overhead range
trunk or shoulder position cannot be maintained
SHOULDER_LUMBAR: symptomatic overhead range or radiating symptoms
shoulder or trunk position cannot be maintained
LUMBAR_HIP: pain increasing with trunk or hip motion
LUMBAR_KNEE: radiating symptoms or inability to bear weight
pain increasing with hinge squat or landing
LUMBAR_WRIST_SHOULDER: acute back wrist or shoulder injury
trunk rack or overhead control is lost
LUMBAR_SHOULDER_WRIST: acute back shoulder or wrist injury
radiating symptoms or symptomatic overhead range
trunk rack or receiving position is lost
LUMBAR_KNEE_WRIST: acute back knee or wrist injury
radiating symptoms or inability to bear weight
trunk squat or rack position is lost
LUMBAR_KNEE_SHOULDER: acute back knee or shoulder injury
radiating symptoms or symptomatic overhead range
trunk squat or receiving position is lost
KNEE: pain increasing with squat lunge or landing
HIP: pain increasing with hip flexion or support

box_jump.stop: Any uncontrolled landing ends jump exposure; regress to step-up.

kettlebell_swing_american.stop: Overhead range must remain symptom-free; Russian swing preserves hinge power when overhead is not authorised.

toes_to_bar.stop: Loss of active shoulder or uncontrolled lumbar swing triggers knee-raise regression.

ghd_sit_up.stop: No novice or unfamiliarised volume; range and reps require explicit permission.

bar_muscle_up.stop: No attempt without strict pull, dip/transition and kipping permissions.

ring_muscle_up.stop: No attempt without false-grip transition, strict pull and stable ring support.

handstand_push_up.stop: No attempt without inversion exit, shoulder/wrist permission and strict pressing reserve.

squat_snatch.stop: Two consecutive misses reduce load 7.5-10%; three total misses end the lift.

clean_and_jerk.stop: Two consecutive misses reduce load 7.5-10%; three total misses end the lift.

rope_climb.stop: Safe descent and foot lock are prerequisites; fatigue never justifies sliding uncontrolled.
